The '''''Tinmolok''''' was a [[Marl-class heavy freighter|''Marl''-class heavy freighter]] manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. Captained by [[Swori Mdimu]] and his [[Etti]] crew, it was part of the [[Peace Brigade]] fleet during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The ship was used to carry supplies and munitions for the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and carried two [[Warrior caste|Yuuzhan Vong warriors]] onboard.

The ship was hijacked by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] one jump from the [[Cha Raaba system]], not far from [[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]]. They were working on creating the [[Great River]], a string of safehouses to transport [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Among the cargo confiscated were three [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]], 200 kilos of [[Lommite/Legends|lommite]], and a large supply of rations. All this would be delivered to [[Shelter]] base in [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]], as the start of a [[Privateer/Legends|privateering]] effort by Solo. The hold also contained [[amphistaff]]s grown on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]].

The ''Tinmolok'' itself was also taken to the Maw and used forthwith by the [[New Jedi Order]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
